_note: W10 done_sentinel (orchestrator STEP-0 derived-state). Full 44-prompt Layer-2 ECONOMY-AUDIT + corpus-wide reconcile of the 15 W9-catalogued inherited findings (.roadmap/09-economy-reconcile.json rolled_to.inherited_findings) PLUS the 40 prompts unaudited at L2 in W9. First job (per W9 lesson) = CALIBRATE _economy-audit.md Rule-2 against the auditor's mis-fire classes (controller-direct, P3/routes_to:canon — the analog of W9's lint.mjs C6/C8 calibration), THEN re-author only genuine residue. Operator-decided PRIORITY (_step-runner I2): SANCTION condensed Register (calibrate) — condensed = accepted RUNTIME register IFF all 6 core parts present verbatim; AB7/8/9 fix-lines + economy-invariant sentence are AUTHORING canon, mandated ONLY where prose authored/audited (IMPLEMENT, ECONOMY-AUDIT). Disk = source of truth (D20); this report is the W10 sentinel, not a tracker.

calibration.route: controller-direct (P3 / routes_to:canon — fix the checker, not 40 artifacts; analog of W9 lint C6/C8 calibration)

sanctioned_patterns.name: dual-mode delta
sanctioned_patterns.clean: fact in two parts of a dual-mode prompt WITH real per-pass delta
sanctioned_patterns.exception_flags: shared fact copied un-factored into both modes -> duplicate-fact

sanctioned_patterns.name: named cross-ref pointer
sanctioned_patterns.clean: pointer naming where a fact lives ('see delta Rule 1', 'Distinction in STEP 4 intro')
sanctioned_patterns.exception_flags: restatement of that section's content beyond the bare pointer -> duplicate-fact

sanctioned_patterns.name: deliberate multi-home emphasis
sanctioned_patterns.clean: load-bearing fact in N homes each carrying DISTINCT framing/reader-action (GIVEN/RULES/STEP)
sanctioned_patterns.exception_flags: verbatim restatement adding no per-home function -> duplicate-fact

sanctioned_patterns.name: orientation/provenance header
sanctioned_patterns.clean: leading blockquote of provenance/North-Star/source refs (agent executes from role line down)
sanctioned_patterns.exception_flags: prose past the header narrating downstream actions changing no reader behavior -> no-objective

sanctioned_patterns.name: condensed Register
sanctioned_patterns.clean: runtime Register conformant IFF all 6 core parts verbatim (Register/Drop/Pattern/NOT-YES/Applies/Stays-literal); AB7/8/9 + economy sentence required ONLY where prose authored/audited
sanctioned_patterns.exception_flags: Register missing ANY of the 6 core parts -> starvation

audit_layer2.method: calibrated ECONOMY-AUDIT swept corpus-wide in 6 phase-batches (fresh subagents); genuine residue re-authored as surface-preserving AB9 trims; FRESH verifier (separate spawn, no self-grade) re-audited the 10 fixed prompts -> all clean, no new defect

verdict_per_phase.03-hld: 8/8 clean (all dual-mode shared/delta verified — no un-factored shared copy)

w9_inherited_findings_disposition._note: Each of the 15 W9-catalogued findings re-judged FRESH under calibration. ~half were auditor mis-fires (now sanctioned); rest genuine (re-authored).

sanctioned_via_rule2_calibration.pattern: role 'one load-bearing thing' slot with fused rationale (AB6 ok at <=3 lines)
a (per-mode task branch, not a shared-copy)
d/a (mode Stop-contract names its write+route target)
a (per-mode branch guard-check, not un-factored shared)
c (GIVEN=scope decl / RULES=standing rule / STEP6=procedure — distinct framing)
c (retirement rationale distinct from SUBAGENT-CONTRACT runtime home)

genuine_re_authored.fix: DELETE parenthetical (downstream VC narration + 'nothing to reject' motivation)
DELETE restatement, KEEP bare pointer '(Distinction in STEP 4 intro)' (pattern b)
operator SANCTIONED condensed (AB7/8/9 absence ok for executor); guardrail caught MISSING core part NOT/YES -> REWRITE restores NOT/YES only

new_corpus_findings_re_authored.fix: REWRITE — IMPLEMENT authors artifact prose (pattern e named author); restore full canonical block (AB7/8/9 fix-lines + economy-invariant sentence)
REWRITE — cut positional/motivational sentences ('Stand between...', 'What survives becomes frame...'); keep who/one-thing/lane
REWRITE — cut 'Prevent that: evaluate every option...' (home = How-to-score Rule 4); keep load-bearing rule
REWRITE — cut prior-stage narration (home = discriminator items 1-2)
REWRITE — cut motivational closer 'Open choice; next stage closes it'

re_author_method: surface-preserving AB9 trims (DELETE clause / REWRITE word / restore verbatim canonical lines). Executable surface byte-identical -> behavior provably unchanged (W9 C4 precedent, operator-accepted); verify = lint clean + FRESH-verifier L2 re-audit clean + surgical-diff confirmation, NOT full clean-room regen. NEVER ADD an instruction to silence a finding (AB9 keystone).

both_directions_proof.claim: calibration narrowed the auditor's mis-fires WITHOUT blinding genuine catches
both_directions_proof.forward_sanctioned_clean: 34 prompts clean as-is + all 11 W9-defensible findings re-judged clean under patterns a-e; CONTROL fixture (named pointer, pattern b) -> clean
both_directions_proof.reverse_genuine_blocked: calibrated auditor STILL caught genuine residue (IMPLEMENT starvation, _step-runner missing-core-part, _orchestrator dup+ambiguous, SLICE-EXTRACT no-objective, 5x 02-adr mandate-narration); PLANTED fixture (verbatim 4th-home no-bookkeeping copy, pattern-c exception) -> BLOCKED on duplicate-fact
both_directions_proof.verifier: fresh ECONOMY-AUDIT spawn (separate from authors); calibration_discriminates: true
both_directions_proof.lint_selftest: tools/economy-lint/selftest.mjs -> PASS 24 checks (W9 C6/C8 calibration regressions + 10 defect injectors still block + determinism stable); corpus lint 44/44 clean unchanged

discriminator.every_finding_resolved_to_exactly_one: prompt DELETE/REWRITE (genuine, via surface-preserving AB9 trim) | _economy-audit Rule-2 calibration (mis-fire, routes_to:canon) | (no lint-profile note needed this wave)

rolled_to.carries: corpus now economy-clean L2 corpus-wide (44/44) + lint 44/44; W8 wires all selftests (validator + resolver + graph-lint + det modules + emitters + economy-lint incl W9 C6/C8 regressions) green into dist/adp-v5.tgz. W8 is the LAST remaining_sequence entry.
